description.english: The first steps on your road to glory!
You are getting closer to greatness.
Some begin to fear your power!
It's time to craft some turrets!
Who said swinging an axe isn't fun?
What sort of wizardry is this?
Raise the roo... I mean dead!
Rock and Ore!
I wonder what awaits us next!
Acquire your first legendary weapon!
For surviving in the Grasslands for 5 minutes, you've unlocked the Dungeon in Endless mode!
For surviving in the Dungeon for 5 minutes, you've unlocked the Beach in Endless mode!
For surviving in the Beach for 5 minutes, you've unlocked the Volcanic Depths in Endless mode!
You've survived in the Grasslands for more than 10 minutes!
You've survived in the Dungeon for more than 10 minutes!
You've survived in the Beach for more than 10 minutes!
You've survived in the Volcanic Depths for more than 10 minutes!
The dead stood no chance.
Not a nice place to go for a swim.
It's a little hot here..
Fight valiantly!

I've never felt so light!

displayName.english: Quest: Book of the Iron Man

description.english: Obtaining this book took a great deal!
Now it's time to fish for some fish!
I wonder what I can catch with this?
Beat the final boss on Ascension III difficulty.
Wow, you've purchased 150 upgrades!
You've slain the greatest challenge in the Volcanic Depths - the Lava Titan!
The Freed Prisoner stood no chance against you!
You're gonna need a bigger shovel.
